AlgoEvent.description: Tagged by the JSON `"type"` field. Only `ALGO_CUSTOM` is defined; any other (or unknown) type fails deserialization — the server logs it at `debug` and continues.

oneOf.description:
Free-form user-defined event. `tag` is required and routes the event through any tag-specific color mapping in `highlight.json → algo.panelColors.customByTag`. Everything else is optional — `message` is displayed in the panel; `data` is stored but rendered as a short preview only.

This is the sole ingress type HLT acts on: the two subscribe verbs (`tag = "ALGO_WEB_WATCH"` / `"ALGO_WEB_SUMMARY"`) are `AlgoCustom` frames the engine intercepts.

TapeEvent.description:
Broadcast payload for every new-high / new-low transition.

Fields map 1:1 to data already present in [`crate::EquityTick`] and [`crate::TrackerState`] — nothing is reconstructed. `Option` fields are serialized as `null` when the provider did not supply them.

cvd.description: Session cumulative volume delta at event time.

high_count.description: Per-symbol cumulative new-high count this session.

last_size.description: Size of the classified print at event time.

low_count.description: Per-symbol cumulative new-low count this session.

market_high_rate_1m.description: Market-wide rolling rate — highs in last 60 s.

market_high_rate_20m.description: Market-wide rolling rate — highs in last 20 m.

market_high_rate_30s.description: Market-wide rolling rate — highs in last 30 s.

market_high_rate_5m.description: Market-wide rolling rate — highs in last 5 m.

market_low_rate_1m.description: Market-wide rolling rate — lows in last 60 s.

market_low_rate_20m.description: Market-wide rolling rate — lows in last 20 m.

market_low_rate_30s.description: Market-wide rolling rate — lows in last 30 s.

market_low_rate_5m.description: Market-wide rolling rate — lows in last 5 m.

trade_side.description: Aggressor on the print that accompanied this transition (`buy` / `sell` / `unknown`).

type.description: Constant `"TAPE_EVENT"` — lets generic JSON consumers dispatch without inspecting the full payload shape. Constructors set this via [`TapeEvent::new`]; deserialization defaults to the same constant so round-trips succeed without carrying the literal in a borrowed string.

TapeEventKind.description:
Which transition triggered this `TapeEvent`.

- `price_update`: intraday last-price update for symbols requested by algo clients via `ALGO_WEB_WATCH` (stop/target tracking). - `market_summary`: periodic market push-pull + breadth bar, emitted only while a client is subscribed via `ALGO_WEB_SUMMARY`.

description: Egress TapeEvent (HLT -> algo) and ingress AlgoEvent (algo -> HLT). See properties.egress and properties.ingress.
title: HighLowTicker Algo Feed wire protocol
